name: pict-section-theme
description: Pict section that bundles every Retold-ecosystem theme (pict-default, retold-mono, twilight, cyberpunk, daylight, neo-tokyo, …) and exposes three reusable views — a theme picker dropdown, a light/dark/system mode toggle, and an embeddable SVG topbar button that pops a theme submenu via pict-section-modal. Wraps pict-provider-theme.
author: Steven Velozo <steven@velozo.com>
